summary: Comprehensive testing of new Published Agents API (CRUD + version control) and Creator Dashboard. All 12 backend tests passed (auth guards, publish, list, get with version_history, PUT name-only no-bump, PUT manifest bumps version, analytics, delete, 404 handling). Frontend Creator Dashboard at /creator renders correctly with stats cards, agent rows, expandable version history, and manifest preview. Studio 'Publish to Marketplace' button (data-testid=publish-agent-btn) fires successfully — toast 'Agent published! v1' shown and new row appears in Supabase. Creator nav link visible for logged-in users. Theme toggle (light→dark) works on /creator.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/published.py: comments above POST/PUT/GET/DELETE mention paths like '/api/agents/publish' and '/api/agents/published' but the actual decorators use '/published-agents/*'. Comments are stale and misleading — should be updated for clarity.
routes/published.py: POST returns HTTP 200 instead of 201 Created on publish (works but not REST-idiomatic).

routes/published.py: get_current_user() wrapper re-imports server.get_current_user on every request — minor overhead and tight coupling. Consider importing once at module load (still avoids circular import via lazy module reference).
routes/published.py: PUT endpoint allows updating status to arbitrary string (no enum validation). Recommend pydantic Literal['published','draft','archived'].
CreatorDashboard.jsx: empty catch blocks ('catch {}' on loadDetail) silently swallow errors. Should at least toast.error on network failure.
CreatorDashboard.jsx: 'headers' object is recreated on every render but not in useCallback deps. Acceptable here since token is in deps but could be tidier.

Studio.jsx handlePublish: error toast uses 'err.detail' but FastAPI HTTPException returns {detail: '...'} — works. However on Supabase failure server returns 500 which exposes 'Failed to publish agent.' — fine.
Studio.jsx handlePublish: empty catch on JSON.parse(codeJson) shows generic 'Publish failed.' — good UX but no telemetry.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (15/15 - dashboard render, stat cards, agent row, version history, manifest preview, delete button, creator nav, refresh/studio buttons, publish button, publish toast, agent persisted in Supabase, theme toggle)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test agents during pytest run + Studio publish smoke test. Pre-existing 'DeFi Whale Tracker' (v2) seed preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_published_agents.py covers full CRUD + version control + auth guards. Frontend verified end-to-end: from /studio → publish-agent-btn click → POST /api/published-agents/publish → toast 'Agent published! v{n}' → row appears in /creator. Token is stored under localStorage keys 'token' AND 'nova_token' (AuthContext likely reads 'nova_token'). User object stored as JSON in 'nova_user'. All data-testids resolve: creator-dashboard, refresh-creator-btn, goto-studio-btn, creator-agent-{id}, delete-published-{id}, publish-agent-btn.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 3 features (publish to Supabase, Creator Dashboard analytics, version_history tracking) work as specified.
